question: What is an AI chatbot?
answer: An AI chatbot is an intelligent assistant built into your website that can answer visitor questions, capture lead details, book appointments, and provide customer support, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, without any human intervention.

question: How much does an AI chatbot cost?
answer: Our AI chatbot packages start from £150/month for a basic lead capture bot, up to £500/month for a fully customised AI assistant with booking integration, CRM sync, and advanced conversation flows.

question: How long does it take to set up?
answer: Most AI chatbots are live within 5-7 working days. We handle the full build, conversation design, training, integration with your website, and testing before launch.

question: Can the chatbot book appointments?
answer: Yes. Our AI chatbots integrate with calendar systems to let visitors book consultations, demos, or appointments directly through the chat, no forms or phone calls needed.

question: Will it work on my existing website?
answer: Absolutely. Our chatbots work on any website platform, WordPress, Shopify, Wix, custom-built sites, or anything else. We provide a simple code snippet to embed it.

question: What kind of content can AI create?
answer: AI can generate blog posts, social media captions, website copy, email newsletters, product descriptions, and SEO-optimised articles, all tailored to your brand voice and industry.

question: Is AI content good for SEO?
answer: When done properly, yes. We use AI as a production tool combined with human editorial oversight to ensure every piece is original, well-structured, keyword-targeted, and genuinely useful for readers.

question: How much does AI content creation cost?
answer: Our content packages start from £200/month for 4 blog posts, up to £800/month for a full content strategy including blogs, social media, and email campaigns.

question: Will the content sound like my brand?
answer: Yes. We train the AI on your brand voice, tone, and style preferences before creating any content. Every piece goes through quality checks to ensure it sounds authentically you.

question: How quickly can you produce content?
answer: AI dramatically accelerates production. We can deliver 4-8 blog posts per week, daily social media content, and weekly email newsletters, consistently and on schedule.

question: What can AI automation do for my business?
answer: AI automation handles repetitive tasks like responding to enquiries, scoring and routing leads, processing data, sending follow-up emails, and triggering workflows, freeing your team to focus on high-value work.

question: How much does AI automation cost?
answer: Automation packages start from £300/month for basic email and lead workflows, up to £1,000/month for full AI-powered business process automation across multiple systems.

question: Do I need technical knowledge to use it?
answer: No. We build and manage everything. You get a simple dashboard to monitor what the automations are doing, but the technical setup and maintenance is handled by us.
